get.summary: Lists stored artifact keys, each with its newest version.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor from a page's `next_cursor` or `prev_cursor`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Match keys containing this substring.

get.summary: Returns one artifact key with its newest version.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Artifact key

get.summary: Lists the stored versions of an artifact.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Artifact key

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor from a page's `next_cursor` or `prev_cursor`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by. Defaults to downloaded time.

parameters.name: media_type
parameters.description: Only versions with this exact media type.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Only versions with this exact version string.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Artifact key

parameters.name: digest
parameters.description: Content digest

delete.summary: Evicts one stored version and its blob, if no other version needs it.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Artifact key

parameters.name: digest
parameters.description: Content digest

get.summary: Lists log events with optional filtering.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor from a page's `next_cursor` or `prev_cursor`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction. Defaults to descending (newest first).

parameters.name: min_level
parameters.description: Only events at this severity or higher.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description:
Only events whose target is one of these (comma-separated). Example:
`aperture,aperture_http`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Substring search across message, target, and structured fields.

parameters.name: span_id
parameters.description: Only events belonging to this span.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only events at or after this time (RFC 3339).

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Only events at or before this time (RFC 3339).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Structured field filter as a JSON object, e.g. `{"key":"value"}`.

get.summary: Lists distinct boot sessions, newest first.
Lists tracing spans with optional filtering.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor from a page's `next_cursor` or `prev_cursor`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction. Defaults to descending (newest first).

parameters.name: min_level
parameters.description: Only spans at this severity or higher.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description:
Only spans whose target is one of these (comma-separated). Example:
`aperture,aperture_storage`.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only spans started at or after this time (RFC 3339).

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Only spans started at or before this time (RFC 3339).

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Only direct children of this span id.

parameters.name: parent_null
parameters.description: When true, only root spans (no parent) are returned.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Structured field filter as a JSON object, e.g. `{"key":"value"}`.

get.summary: Returns a single span with its events.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Span id

get.summary: Lists distinct log targets for autocomplete.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Only targets starting with this prefix.

get.summary: Lists the registered task kinds with their capabilities and JSON Schemas.

Lists task invocations, optionally filtered by status, kind, and parent.
Running tasks carry live progress.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor from a page's `next_cursor` or `prev_cursor`.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Only tasks in this state, or the `active`/`finished` groups.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Only tasks of this kind.

parameters.name: parent
parameters.description: Only children of this task.

parameters.name: root
parameters.description: Only top-level tasks (no parent). Ignored when `parent` is set.

parameters.name: input_path
parameters.description:
Only tasks whose input JSON has `input_value` at this path, for example
`key` or `source.reference`. Requires `input_value`.

parameters.name: input_value
parameters.description: The value the field at `input_path` must equal.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description:
Only tasks whose output JSON has `output_value` at this path. Requires
`output_value`.

parameters.name: output_value
parameters.description: The value the field at `output_path` must equal.

post.summary:
Creates a task of the given kind and starts it. The body input is validated
against the kind's input schema.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task id

post.summary: Requests cooperative cancellation of a running task.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Task id

get.summary: Returns version information about the gateway.

ArtifactSummaryResponse.description:
A distinct artifact key with its newest version, for `GET
/api/v1/artifacts`.

digest.description: Content digest of the newest version.

downloaded_at.description: When the newest version was downloaded.

size_bytes.description: Stored blob size of the newest version, in bytes.

source.description: Where the newest version came from.

version.description: Human-readable version of the newest version, if known.

version_count.description: How many versions of this key are stored.

ArtifactVersionResponse.description: One stored version of an artifact.

digest.description: Content digest of the stored blob.

verified_at.description: When this version was last verified, if ever.

BootResponse.description:
One boot session observed in the log store, returned by
`GET /api/v1/logs/boots`.

event_count.description: Number of events recorded so far in this boot.

first_seen.description: Timestamp of the earliest event in this boot.

is_current.description: True if this is the currently running gateway boot.

last_seen.description: Timestamp of the latest event in this boot.

input.description: The task input, matching the kind's input schema.

kind.description: The kind of task to create.

DownloadInput.description: Input for a download task: what to fetch and where from.

key.description: Logical key to record the artifact under.

source.description: Where and how to fetch it from.

DownloadOutput.description: Output of a download task: the stored version that resulted.

digest.description: Content digest of the stored blob.

oneOf.description: A layer of an OCI image.

media_type.description: The media type of the layer to pull.

LevelResponse.description: Severity level of a log event or span.

LogEventResponse.description: A single log event, returned by `GET /api/v1/logs`.

fields.description: All structured fields as a JSON object, if any.

span_id.description: Span this event belongs to, if any.

target.description: Module path that emitted the event.

events.description: Events belonging to this span, ordered by timestamp.

LogSpanDetailResponse.description: A span with its child events, returned by `GET /api/v1/logs/spans/{id}`.

ended_at.description: When the span ended, if it did.

fields.description: Span fields as a JSON object, if any.

target.description: Module path that created the span.

OrderParam.description: Sort direction shared by list endpoints.

Page_ArtifactSummaryResponse.description: A page of results plus the cursors for the neighbouring pages.

items.description:
A distinct artifact key with its newest version, for `GET
/api/v1/artifacts`.

digest.description: Content digest of the newest version.

downloaded_at.description: When the newest version was downloaded.

size_bytes.description: Stored blob size of the newest version, in bytes.

source.description: Where the newest version came from.

version.description: Human-readable version of the newest version, if known.

version_count.description: How many versions of this key are stored.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the next page. Null at the end.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the previous page. Null at the start.

Page_ArtifactVersionResponse.description: A page of results plus the cursors for the neighbouring pages.

items.description: One stored version of an artifact.

digest.description: Content digest of the stored blob.

verified_at.description: When this version was last verified, if ever.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the next page. Null at the end.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the previous page. Null at the start.

Page_LogEventResponse.description: A page of results plus the cursors for the neighbouring pages.

items.description: A single log event, returned by `GET /api/v1/logs`.

fields.description: All structured fields as a JSON object, if any.

span_id.description: Span this event belongs to, if any.

target.description: Module path that emitted the event.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the next page. Null at the end.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the previous page. Null at the start.

Page_LogSpanResponse.description: A page of results plus the cursors for the neighbouring pages.

ended_at.description: When the span ended, if it did.

fields.description: Span fields as a JSON object, if any.

target.description: Module path that created the span.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the next page. Null at the end.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the previous page. Null at the start.

Page_TaskResponse.description: A page of results plus the cursors for the neighbouring pages.

items.description: One task invocation, returned by the task endpoints.

finished_at.description: When it finished, if it did.

input.description: The input the task was created with.

output.description: The output, once the task succeeds.

parent_id.description: The parent invocation, if this task was spawned by another.

oneOf.description: Live progress, present only while running.

started_at.description: When it started running, if it did.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the next page. Null at the end.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as `?cursor=` for the previous page. Null at the start.

ProgressMessageResponse.description: A localizable progress message: a translation key and its arguments.

args.description: Arguments to interpolate into the resolved message.

key.description: Translation key for the current step.

ProgressResponse.description: Live progress of a running task.

done.description: Units of work completed so far.

oneOf.description: A localizable description of the current step.

total.description: Total units of work expected, if known.

TaskDefinitionResponse.description: A registered task kind, with its capabilities and JSON Schemas.

cancellable.description: Whether the kind can be cancelled.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema of the kind's input.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema of the kind's output.

resumable.description: Whether the kind is safe to interrupt across a restart.

TaskResponse.description: One task invocation, returned by the task endpoints.

finished_at.description: When it finished, if it did.

input.description: The input the task was created with.

output.description: The output, once the task succeeds.

parent_id.description: The parent invocation, if this task was spawned by another.

oneOf.description: Live progress, present only while running.

started_at.description: When it started running, if it did.

TaskStatusParam.description: Filter for task status, including the `active` and `finished` groups.

TaskStatusResponse.description: Lifecycle state of a task invocation.

boot_id.description: Unique id of this gateway boot session.

VersionSortParam.description: Field a version listing is sorted by.
